feedback.noAnalysis: No analysis found for this application.
feedback.fitHighDesc: Strong match. Your profile demonstrates competitive quality for this role.
feedback.fitMediumDesc: Promising match. Targeted improvements will increase your chances.
feedback.fitLowDesc: Significant gaps found. Focus on the priorities below.

marketing.heroTitle: Stand out in your next job opportunity
marketing.heroDescription: AI-powered CV analysis, interview preparation, and workplace scenario simulations. Get ready for English-speaking job environments with personalized coaching.
marketing.featuresDescription: AI-powered tools for CV analysis, interview prep, and Business English coaching.
marketing.faqSubtitle: Answers to common questions about StandOut.
marketing.faq1a: StandOut is an AI-powered platform that helps you prepare for English-speaking job environments through CV analysis, interview practice, and workplace scenario simulations.
marketing.faq2a: Upload your CV and paste a job description. Our AI compares your profile against the role requirements and provides detailed feedback with fit score, skills gaps, and recommendations.
marketing.faq3q: How much does each analysis cost?
marketing.faq3a: Each analysis uses 10 credits. You can purchase credits through our subscription plans.
marketing.faq4a: We offer CV-to-job matching analysis, AI-generated interview flashcards, workplace audio scenario simulations, and a personalized AI career coach.

dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Prepare for your career with AI-powered coaching and practice.
dashboard.step1Desc: Add your resume and job description to get personalized analysis.
dashboard.step2Desc: Study flashcards with questions tailored to your role and industry.
dashboard.step3Desc: Practice workplace situations and get Business English feedback.
dashboard.profileDesc: Upload your CV, add a job description, and get AI-powered analysis of your fit for the role.
dashboard.interviewDesc: Practice with AI-generated interview questions based on your career profile and target role.
dashboard.scenariosDesc: Simulate real workplace situations like meetings, presentations, and client calls.
dashboard.aiCoachDesc: Get personalized career advice, Business English coaching, and application support.
dashboard.interviewTipsDesc: Use the STAR method, research the company, and practice common questions.
dashboard.businessEnglishDesc: Professional vocabulary, email writing, and meeting etiquette.
dashboard.careerTipsDesc: Tailor your CV for each role, highlight achievements, and quantify results.
dashboard.emptyStateDesc: Upload your CV to get started with personalized career preparation.
